data.name: Sex Hotel Simulator 🏩
data.detailed_description:
Sex Hotel Simulator🏩 is an adult Visual novel with the mechanics of pumping a hotel

Welcome to the captivating world of "Sex Hotel Simulator," where you'll take on the role of a brothel owner and elevate it to the pinnacle of fame and success! In this thrilling simulation game, your goal is to restore and upgrade your hotel, attract the hottest clientele, and offer unforgettable adult entertainment.

You'll have boundless opportunities to expand and enhance your brothel. Improve and update each room, creating a unique ambiance and setting for the best intimate encounters. Install diverse furniture, lighting, and decor to ensure comfort and pleasure for your guests.

Automate the processes of your brothel by developing a management system and organizing your staff. Hire and train sexy workers, assign duties, and ensure that each client receives an unforgettable experience during their visit. Your reputation and customer satisfaction will determine your fate in this exciting world.

"Sex Hotel Simulator" is filled with hidden secrets and surprises around every corner. Achieve success by unlocking the full range of adult content and become an impeccable leader in this industry.


Features:
  • A fascinating story
  • An easy-to-pick-up game that rewards your creativity
  • Real-time 3D character and animations
  • A Multitude of Sexy Situations
  • Ability to play with one hand. ( ͡~ ͜ʖ ͡°)

data.short_description: Welcome to the captivating world of "Sex Hotel Simulator," where you'll take on the role of a brothel owner and elevate it to the pinnacle of fame and success!
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 阿拉伯文, 保加利亞文, 越南文, 希臘文, 丹麥文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文, 韓文, 挪威文, 荷蘭文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 俄文, 羅馬尼亞文, 泰文, 土耳其文, 匈牙利文, 烏克蘭文, 芬蘭文, 捷克文, 瑞典文, 日文, 印尼語, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or above
  • 處理器: Intel or AMD
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Direct X compatible
  • 儲存空間: 6 GB 可用空間
